core_operations.name: Trigger Recognition
core_operations.question: Has an anomaly been recognized as a trigger rather than tolerated as background noise?
core_operations.failure_mode: anomaly exists but is not recognized as trigger

core_operations.name: Cost Assumption
core_operations.question: Who assumes the cost of interrupting the cheapest continuation?
core_operations.failure_mode: cost is avoided, displaced, or unassigned

core_operations.name: Reopening Act
core_operations.question: Has an excluded or suppressed alternative become operational again?
core_operations.failure_mode: critique occurs but no alternative path is restored

core_operations.name: Persistence of Re-entry
core_operations.question: Does the re-entry path persist beyond the first rupture?
